text_original: Love the App! best AI ar remembering the scenario.
text_zh: 太爱这个应用了！它是最擅长记住剧情设定的 AI。
reply_original: Wow, reading your message just made our entire team's day! We are thrilled to hear that our AI is doing a great job remembering your unique scenarios—we've been working hard on those "memory muscles." Your support is the fuel that keeps us going. If you ever have suggestions, feel free to reach us at support@fantachat.ai. Enjoy the magic!
reply_zh: 哇，读到您的留言让我们整个团队都开心极了！很高兴听到我们的 AI 在记忆您的独特场景方面表现出色——我们一直在努力锻炼这些“记忆肌肉”。您的支持是驱动我们前进的动力。如果您有任何建议，请随时通过 support@fantachat.ai 联系我们。尽情享受这份魔法吧！
